creator: dmm125@bellatlantic.net
text:
While booting 2.2-RELEASE, hangs immediately after displaying
"probing for devices on the ISA bus" -  can't go any further.  On 
one occasion computer locked up after displaying the root prompt.
Does not always lock up, though - some boots are succesful.
About 30-40% success rate.  Computer is a 386SX.

Fix: 

Don't know.  I think maybe it is using the wrong bus speed to probe the
ISA bus.  (If it is even relevant).  Had similar problems with
3.0-SNAPxxx (3.0 CURRENT); problems went away when kernel was
recompiled.
How-To-Repeat: Reset computer.  Boot into FreeBSD RELEASE 2.2.  Boot enough times
until computer hangs.  Boot on  386sx if possible.
